trans_hard_a_shape_concentration: Of 30 trans_hard examples in T2A-DEGREE42-DEEP-VALIDATE, all 30 lie in only 2 a-shapes: {1,-1,-1,-1,-1} (16) and {1,-1,-1,-1,0} (14). The full 1162-family pool may be more diverse but is not stored in that session's results JSON.
input_pool_uniformly_NULL: ALL 41 input families (T2A R1 + 30 trans_hard + 10 sampled IRR482) were NULL across all 5 tiers AND were not Mobius- or algebraic-demoted. This is a 100% T3-candidate rate, which strongly suggests the basis is too small rather than that T3 is broadly populated. The escalated 5 are merely a representative sample of a much larger empirical-T3 cohort under this basis.
